Meta.title: prova — hiring with the lights on
Meta.description: Task-first hiring: show your skill on a short neutral test and see every stage of the path to an offer. No résumé gate, no waiting in the dark.

Landing.heroSub: Show your skill on a short neutral test — no résumé gate, no cover letters, no waiting in the dark. You see every stage of the path to an offer. Scroll — we'll build the lamp.
Landing.ch1Body: No résumé gate, no cover letters. A short neutral task — standardized by prova, never a slice of real client work — is the whole application. Honest time estimate on every brief.
Landing.ch2Title: The lead measures the work, not the name.
Landing.ch2Body: Your test opens before your profile — reviewed like a drawing, to the millimetre. The status flips to “in review” the moment they look. You see it live.
Landing.ch3Body: The studio says “interested”, with a note from the lead. You decide to continue. Applying incognito? Your identity opens only to this studio, only when you say so.
Landing.ch4Body: Contacts exchanged — calls, interviews, the offer happen directly with the studio. We step back, but every stage stays tracked until there's an answer.
Landing.ch5Body: An offer — or an honest “no” with a reason. Never silence: studios' response times are public, and unanswered applications hit their stats, not your nerves.
Landing.demoLabel: This is what a role looks like
Landing.demoTitle: The whole path, priced and timed — before you commit a minute
Landing.cardStudioMeta: Interior design · Berlin · replies in ~3 days
Landing.d1Sub: Zoning concept, 32 m² studio · not a real project
Landing.d2Sub: Artem, senior designer — sees your work first
Landing.d4Sub: Interview & offer, straight with the studio
Landing.cardPolicy: Standardized by prova — a neutral skill check with an honest time estimate, never unpaid client work.
Landing.wlTitle: Want to interview with the lights on?
Landing.wlStudioLine: Running a studio? The pilot is onboarding now — every candidate in your queue has already done the work. Pick “I'm hiring” above.
Landing.footerTagline: Show your skills, not your résumé.

Waitlist.success: Done — you're on the list. We'll write when the lights come on.

Jobs.listSub: Every role shows the whole path: the test, the timings, who reviews. No résumé gate.
Jobs.listEmpty: No open roles right now — join early access on the main page.
Jobs.briefHidden: The full brief opens after you apply.
Jobs.policyBadge: Standardized by prova — a neutral skill check with an honest time estimate, never real client work.
Jobs.applyAuthNote: Signing in takes one email — no password needed.

Auth.title: Sign in
Auth.subtitle: One account to take test tasks and see exactly where you stand. No passwords — we email you a sign-in link.
Auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. It stays valid for one hour.
Auth.errorAuth: Sign-in didn't go through. Please try again.
Auth.errorLink: That link has expired or was already used. Request a new one below.
Auth.noPasswords: First time here? The same link creates your account — nothing else to fill in.

Profile.title: Your profile
Profile.subtitle: Filled once, reused for every application. This is not a CV — just what a studio needs to see next to your work.
Profile.subtitleOnboarding: 60–90 seconds, once — then straight to the test task.
Profile.headline: Headline
Profile.headlinePlaceholder: Interior designer focused on residential projects
Profile.portfolioHint: Up to 5 links, one per line.
Profile.portfolioUrl: Each line must be a valid link (https://…).
Profile.incognitoHint: Free, forever. Your name, photo and links stay hidden from a studio until you confirm a match with it.
Profile.incognitoOnHint: Hidden until you confirm a match: name, photo, portfolio links. The studio still sees your city, experience band, software — and the work itself.
Profile.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Apply.title: Test task
Apply.startNote: Only you can see an unfinished start — the studio is never notified until you submit. You can come back to this page anytime.
Apply.commentPlaceholder: e.g. Layout done in SketchUp — the brief allowed either.
Apply.commentHint: About the work itself. Motivation is already proven — you did the task.
Apply.needWork: Attach a PDF or add a link — the work itself is required.
Apply.submitNote: The studio reviews the work first — your profile stays behind a tab.
Apply.incognitoChecklistTitle: You're incognito — a quick check before submitting
Apply.incognitoChecklist: Remove your name and identifying projects from the PDF and the link. We keep your profile hidden, but the file is your work — keep it anonymous too.
Apply.statusSTARTED: You've started — submit whenever the work is ready.
Apply.statusSUBMITTED: Submitted. The studio hasn't opened it yet — the moment they do, this flips to "in review".
Apply.statusIN_REVIEW: The studio is looking at your work right now.
Apply.statusINTERESTED: The studio is interested and wants to continue — confirm below and we'll exchange contacts.
Apply.statusMATCHED: It's a match — contacts are exchanged. You talk directly now.
Apply.statusFINAL: You're in the final conversations with the studio.
Apply.statusHIRED: Hired. Congratulations — this is what the whole path was for.
Apply.statusDECLINED: The studio decided not to continue — always with a reason. Check your email.
Apply.statusWITHDRAWN: You chose not to continue. This thread is closed.
Apply.statusEXPIRED: The studio went quiet for too long, so we closed this application. That's a timeout on their side — not a rejection of your work. It counts against the studio's public response stats.
Apply.confirmTitle: The studio wants to continue. Your move.
Apply.confirmNote: Confirming exchanges contacts: {studio} gets your email, you get theirs. Nothing else changes — you're deciding to talk, not to accept anything.
Apply.confirmIncognitoNote: You're incognito. Confirming shares your name, portfolio and email with {studio} — and only with them. Passing shares nothing, ever.
Apply.passConfirm: Close this application? The studio will see you chose not to continue — that's all they'll see.
Apply.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw? The studio simply sees you chose not to continue.
Apply.contactNote: It's a match. From here you talk to {studio} directly — the platform steps back but keeps the light on the outcome.

Dashboard.title: Applications
Dashboard.subtitle: Everyone here has already done the work. The test is the first tab; the profile waits behind it.
Dashboard.empty: No submissions yet. Candidates see your vacancy — the first completed test will land here.
Dashboard.notMemberTitle: This area is for studio leads
Dashboard.notMemberBody: You're signed in with a candidate account. If your studio hires through prova and this is the wrong screen, write to us — we'll link your email to the studio.
Dashboard.incognitoNote: This candidate is incognito: name, photo and portfolio links stay hidden until they confirm a match with your studio. The work and the skill facts are all here.
Dashboard.workFileOpen: Open the PDF in a new tab
Dashboard.workFileError: Couldn't load the file. Refresh the page or try again later.
Dashboard.interestTitle: Tell them what caught your eye
Dashboard.interestMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Loved how you handled the zoning around the wet areas.
Dashboard.interestMessageHint: One human sentence doubles confirmation rates. The candidate confirms before contacts are exchanged.
Dashboard.interestedBanner: Waiting for the candidate to confirm. We'll notify you the moment they do.
Dashboard.declineIntro: The candidate always gets an answer — pick a reason or write your own. It's sent as-is.
Dashboard.reason_experience: Not enough relevant experience for this role
Dashboard.noteRequired: Write the reason — the candidate always gets an answer.
Dashboard.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Dashboard.withdrawnBanner: The candidate chose not to continue. That's the whole story — no identity was shared.
Dashboard.matchedNote: Contacts are exchanged — talk directly. We'll check in about the outcome so the path stays lit for everyone.
